steps.title: Keep the name essential
steps.content: The phrase Stephen Graham Jones identifies which novelist the editors turned to. Because the name is essential to the noun phrase, it should not be set off by commas.

steps.title: Avoid extra commas
steps.content: Choice A wrongly places a comma before to craft, Choice C treats the name as nonessential, and Choice D opens that comma pattern without closing it. The noun phrase should read smoothly without commas. The answer is B.
